title: The Haunted Hotel
desc: A ghost with a silver sword haunts the Shangri-la — but is it real? 👻

q.en: What is the name of the hotel where the ghost appears?
q.zh: 闹鬼的旅馆叫什么名字？

options.en: The Green Lawn Inn according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 格林劳恩客栈（按书中另一种说法）
香格里拉旅馆（The Shangri-la Hotel）

explain.en: The newspaper reports a ghost haunting the Shangri-la Hotel in Green Lawn.
explain.zh: 报纸报道格林劳恩的香格里拉旅馆里有鬼。

q.zh: 谁负责管理香格里拉旅馆？

options.zh: 林肯莱特先生，也就是旅馆老板的侄子

options.en: Livvy the maid according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 女佣丽薇（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Mr. Linkletter is the hotel manager and nephew of the owners, Mr. and Mrs. Spivets.
explain.zh: 林肯莱特先生是旅馆经理，也是老板斯皮维特夫妇的侄子。

q.en: At what time of night does the ghost appear?
q.zh: 鬼是在深夜几点出现的？

explain.en: Guests report seeing the ghost float down the hall at midnight, carrying a silver sword.
explain.zh: 客人们说在午夜看到鬼拿着一把银剑在走廊里飘过。

q.en: What does Ruth Rose find on the fire-exit doorframe that proves the ghost is fake?
q.zh: 露丝·罗丝在消防门框上发现了什么，证明鬼是假的？

options.en: A white hair from a wig
A silver sword according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一把银剑（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Ruth Rose plucks a white hair from the doorframe; later they match it to a wig in Room 301.
explain.zh: 露丝·罗丝从门框上揪下一根白头发，后来证明它和301房间的假发一致。

q.en: Who was really pretending to be the ghost?

options.en: Mr. Linkletter according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 林肯莱特先生（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Mr. and Mrs. Jeffers, two actors

explain.en: The Jefferses confess they are actors hired to scare guests away from the hotel.
explain.zh: 杰弗斯夫妇承认他们是受雇来把客人吓跑的演员。

q.en: Who hired the 'ghost' to scare the guests away?
q.zh: 是谁雇了‘鬼’来把客人吓走？

options.en: Eatch, Rail, and Roock, a real estate company
options.zh: 一家叫伊奇、雷尔和鲁克（Eatch, Rail, and Roock）的房地产公司

options.en: Dink's mother according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 丁克的妈妈（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: The real estate men wanted the hotel cheap, so they paid the Jefferses to drive guests away and force a sale.
explain.zh: 那家房地产公司想低价买下旅馆，所以雇杰弗斯夫妇把客人吓走，逼老板卖房。

q.en: What gives away the crooks' real plan?
q.zh: 是什么暴露了骗子们的真实图谋？

options.en: They drove a red car according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他们开一辆红色的车（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Their names rearrange to 'Cheat, Liar, and Crook'
options.zh: 他们的名字重新排列就是‘骗子、说谎者、无赖’

explain.en: Mrs. Spivets points out that Eatch, Rail, and Roock can be rearranged into Cheat, Liar, and Crook.
explain.zh: 斯皮维特太太指出，Eatch、Rail、Roock 这几个名字重新组合就是 Cheat、Liar、Crook（骗子、说谎者、无赖）。

q.en: What fake props did the ghost use?

options.en: A real sword and a mask according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 一把真剑和一个面具（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: A white wig, clown makeup, a painted-wood sword, and a tape recorder
options.zh: 白色假发、小丑化妆品、涂了颜色的木剑，还有一台录音机

explain.en: In Room 301 the kids find the wig, makeup, a wooden sword, and a tape recorder playing spooky noises.
explain.zh: 在301房间，孩子们找到假发、化妆品、木剑和播放诡异声音的录音机。

q.en: How do the kids help save the hotel at the signing?
q.zh: 在签约现场，孩子们是怎么帮忙保住旅馆的？

options.en: They call the fire department according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他们叫了消防队（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: Josh dresses as the ghost and the Jefferses expose the real estate men to a reporter
options.zh: 乔什扮成鬼，杰弗斯夫妇当着记者的面揭穿了房地产骗子

explain.en: Josh pops up in the ghost costume while the Jefferses reveal the crooks; reporter Linda Gomez prints the story.
explain.zh: 乔什穿着鬼装突然出现，杰弗斯夫妇揭穿骗子，记者琳达·戈麦斯把事情登了报。

q.en: What reward do Mr. and Mrs. Spivets give the three kid detectives?
q.zh: 斯皮维特夫妇给了三位小侦探什么奖励？

options.en: Plane tickets to Florida, Disney World passes, and money
options.zh: 去佛罗里达的机票、迪士尼世界的门票，还有一笔钱

options.en: A pet ghost according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 一只宠物鬼（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: The Spivetses thank the kids with plane tickets, Disney passes, and cash in envelopes.
explain.zh: 斯皮维特夫妇用信封装着机票、迪士尼门票和现金感谢孩子们。
